news.headline: Wells Fargo expects to report $1.28 EPS and $20.41B revenue for Q3. Investors eyeing the 2.78% dividend yield.
news.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) is set to announce its third quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, Oct. 11. Analysts predict the San Francisco-based bank will post earnings of $1.28 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $1.48 per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to report revenue of $20.41 billion. Wells Fargo's current annual dividend yield stands at 2.78%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 40 cents per share ($1.60 annually). Investors might be looking at potential gains from dividends. For those aiming to earn $500 monthly from Wells Fargo, achieving a yearly target of $6,000 ($500 x 12 months) is crucial. To calculate this, the annual target is divided by...Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: RingCentral gains license to offer global UCaaS and CCaaS in India, across 22 circles, after approval from DoT.
news.summary: In Belmont, California, RingCentral has been granted a PAN-India license from the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) to conduct operations in all of India's 22 telecommunications circles.

news.headline: Eaton and Lunar Energy partner for simplified residential energy storage and solar system installation, utilizing Eaton's AbleEdgeTM smart breakers.
news.summary: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company, has recently partnered with Lunar Energy to streamline the setup and enhance the capabilities of residential energy storage and solar systems. Through the incorporation of Eaton's innovative AbleEdgeTM intelligent breakers with the Lunar System, the process of implementing solar and storage solutions will become more user-friendly for both technicians and homeowners. This collaboration aims to facilitate load management, cost optimization, and the prolonged functionality of solar battery systems. The joint effort is anticipated to bring about significant positive changes in the home energy sector, benefiting both industry professionals and consumers.

news.headline: Acronis survey finds 71% of women in IT work longer hours, facing challenges. 32% see gender equality.
news.summary: Acronis, a cybersecurity and data protection company, released a report titled "The New FOMO: Females Fear Missing Opportunities in IT" discussing gender diversity in the IT industry. The report was presented at the Women in Tech panel at MSP Global in Spain. The survey found that 32% of female respondents believe men and women are treated equally in the workplace, while 31% strongly disagree. The industry is criticized for limited career development opportunities, lack of mentorship, and work-life balance issues. This highlights the need for more inclusion and support for women in IT. Check out the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SuperCom and Prime Partner Electra secure a 5-year contract with Israel Prison Service for electronic monitoring. Program covers 1,500+ offenders with a 4-year extension option.
news.summary: SuperCom, a leading global provider of secure e-Government and IoT solutions, has announced the activation of a new contract for the National Electronic Monitoring Program in Tel Aviv, Israel. The program is projected to cover more than 1,500 offenders. Additionally, there is a provision for a potential extension of up to four years.

news.headline: Hayward Holdings (NYSE: HAYW) to announce Q3 2024 earnings on October 29, 2024, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Hayward Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HAYW), a leading provider of pool and outdoor living technology, is set to release its third quarter 2024 earnings on October 29, 2024. The company will host a conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Investors and other stakeholders can tune in to a webcast for more details.

news.headline: Labcorp partners with NOWDiagnostics to distribute syphilis tests in the U.S., expanding STI offerings.
news.summary: Labcorp has been selected as the sole distributor of NOWDx clinical testing products in the United States. This partnership includes the distribution of the First to Know® Syphilis Test across the nation. The agreement, effective as of October 10, 2024, solidifies Labcorp's position as a key player in the field. Labcorp, listed on the NYSE as LH, is renowned for its cutting-edge laboratory services. The collaboration will enhance access to crucial diagnostic tests, benefiting a wide range of consumers.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price Group reports $1.63 trillion in assets under management as of September 30, 2024 with $4.9 billion net outflows.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. announced that their assets under management stood at $1.63 trillion as of September 30, 2024. The company reported net outflows of $4.9 billion for September 2024, while the total net outflows amounted to $12.2 billion for the month.

news.headline: Perfect Moment expands U.S. resale program, now available in UK, France, Italy, and Germany. (Numbers: NYSE American: PMNT)
news.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd., known for its high-performance luxury skiwear and lifestyle products, has broadened the reach of its U.S. resale initiative, Perfect Second Moment, to include the UK, Italy, Germany, and France. This move aims to prolong the lifespan of the company's premium goods and highlights its dedication to durability and quality. Trading under the ticker symbol PMNT on NYSE American, Perfect Moment continues to blend technical expertise with fashion-forward designs to cater to a wide market. This global expansion signifies the brand's commitment to sustainability and customer satisfaction, offering more individuals the opportunity to access their renowned products.

news.headline: ExxonMobil secures largest CO2 offshore storage site in US at 271,000 acres, solidifying Gulf Coast as CCS leader.
news.summary: In Spring, Texas, Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) has finalized the most extensive offshore carbon dioxide (CO2) storage agreement in the United States with the Texas General Land Office (GLO). The lease encompasses more than 271,000 acres and enhances ExxonMobil's onshore CO2 storage initiatives, reinforcing the U.S. Gulf Coast's position as a pioneer in carbon capture and storage (CCS). Describing the deal as a demonstration of dedication to CCS, company President Dan Ammann emphasized the progress achieved.

news.headline: BGC Group acquires Sage Energy Partners, an energy and environmental brokerage firm, to expand its services. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: In a recent announcement, BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC), a prominent global brokerage and financial technology firm, disclosed its acquisition of Sage Energy Partners, LP ("Sage"), an energy and environmental brokerage company. This strategic move signifies BGC's efforts to broaden its presence in the energy sector.

news.headline: Cytovale secures $100M in Series D funding to expand IntelliSep test, showing promising impact in saving lives and costs.
news.summary: In its initial year on the market, the FDA-approved IntelliSep test, taking approximately 8 minutes to deliver results, has proven instrumental in saving lives and cutting costs for hospitals, all the while prioritizing patient care. The positive real-world impacts of this test have captured the attention of investors, who are now stepping in to expedite its commercialization and equip emergency departments nationwide.

news.headline: SurgePays signs MSA with TerraCom, Inc. for ACP customers to opt-in to Lifeline Program. BARTLETT, Tenn., Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: SurgePays, Inc. (Nasdaq: SURG), a technology and telecom company based in Bartlett, Tennessee, revealed on October 10, 2024, that existing ACP customers are now able to enroll in the Lifeline Program. The company announced the signing of a Master Services Agreement (MSA) with TerraCom, Inc. as part of this initiative.

news.headline: Varda to present research at two scientific conferences after successful mission in microgravity.  #Pharmaceutical #ChemicalEngineering.
news.summary: Following a productive inaugural venture in microgravity, Varda is set to showcase its research at two forthcoming scientific gatherings. Based in El Segundo, California, as of October 10, 2024, Varda Space Industries, Inc. – renowned as the pioneer in in-space pharmaceutical processing – has disclosed its involvement.

news.headline: AI and ML solutions to drive Southeast Asia's sustainability agenda by improving efficiency and carbon monitoring.
news.summary: New York, October 10, 2024 - The implementation of AI and ML solutions is projected to significantly contribute to the region's sustainable growth by enhancing operational efficiency and simplifying carbon emission monitoring and reporting. This initiative comes as a response to increasing demands from global entities and governments to promote sustainability.AI and ML technologies are expected to play a crucial role in improving processes and addressing environmental concerns in the area. These innovations aim to streamline operations and enhance the accuracy of carbon emission tracking, thus fostering a more sustainable business environment. Such advancements are crucial for organizations looking to align with international standards and meet regulatory requirements in the push for environmentally responsible practices. By leveraging AI and ML capabilities, businesses can expect to not only optimize their operations but also contribute to a greener and more sustainable future.

news.headline: Tetra Tech [TTI] to release Q3 earnings on Oct 29, 2024, and host a conference on Oct 30, 2024 in Texas.
news.summary: Texan company TETRA Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: TTI) has revealed plans to disclose its third-quarter financial results after market hours on Tuesday, October 29, 2024. Following this, on October 30, 2024, the company will conduct a conference.

news.headline: Arrow Financial Corp. (NasdaqGS: AROW) named to Piper Sandler Sm-All Stars: Class of 2024 for top-performing small-cap banks.
news.summary: Arrow Financial Corporation based in Glens Falls, New York, revealed on October 10, 2024, that it has been included in the Piper Sandler Sm-All Stars: Class of 2024. This list features 30 of the leading small-cap banks and thrifts in the United States. Arrow Financial Corporation trades on NasdaqGS under the ticker symbol AROW. The company is honored to be recognized for its performance in the small-cap sector.

news.headline: GOCare hires Kevin Mitchell and Lake Stockdreher to boost sales and marketing for broadband digital platform.
news.summary: Kevin Mitchell and Lake Stockdreher, experienced industry professionals, have partnered to enhance sales, marketing, and partnership efforts for the broadband sector's specialized digital experience platform in ALPHARETTA, Georgia. The collaboration was announced on Oct. 10, 2024. GOCare, a leading SaaS company offering digital experience solutions for the broadband industry, will benefit from their expertise.

news.headline: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31, 2024 before market open.
news.summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for Q3 2024 on October 31, 2024, before the market opens. The report will cover the three-month period ending September 30, 2024. The company extends an invitation to all individuals keen on reviewing the figures.

news.headline: OpenText's 2024 Cybersecurity Survey shows 50% of companies face ransomware attacks, perpetuating vulnerability cycles - PR Newswire.
news.summary: Despite companies enhancing their security measures, nearly 50% of survey participants are still experiencing ransomware attacks. The subsequent ransom payments are contributing to a continuation of the vulnerability cycle. This information was provided by OpenText, disclosed on October 10, 2024. The company is listed on NASDAQ under OTEX and on the TSX as OTEX. This marks the release of their third annual report for 2024.

news.headline: US Super Core Inflation MoM: 0.404%
Traders add to bets on quarter-point Fed rate cut in November.
Trinity Capital Inc. invests $40 million in growth capital into Beam Benefits, a digitally native company.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN), a prominent financial solutions provider for growing companies, disclosed its plan to invest $40 million in growth capital into Beam Benefits. Beam, a digitally focused company, has secured this commitment from Trinity to support its expansion.

news.headline: Yakira Capital urges Territorial Bancorp to reconsider acquisition offer from Blue Hill Advisors despite a superior bid.
news.summary: Territorial turned down initial talks with Blue Hill despite a stronger financial bid, which could be violating the Board's fiduciary responsibility. The event took place in Westport, Connecticut on October 10, 2024. Yakira Capital Management, an investment firm located in Westport, CT, released a statement about the incident.

news.headline: Cengage Work report shows high course completion rates due to career-aligned course work and educational support.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 10th, 2024, Cengage Work, a branch of the edtech company Cengage Group, unveiled their successful training programs. These programs are designed to align with various career paths, providing learners with relevant course material. The incorporation of flexible course scheduling, along with the utilization of technology tools and educational resources, aims to enhance the learning experience. As a result of these initiatives, Cengage Work has observed a significant increase in completion rates among participants. This highlights the positive impact of tailored coursework and support systems, indicating a successful approach to skill development.

news.headline: LightPath Technologies will attend AUSA 2024 Expo on Oct 14-16, 2024 to discuss next-gen optics with customers.
news.summary: A company will be conducting meetings in Orlando, Florida on October 10, 2024, to engage with potential customers and end-users. The focus will be on discussing LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH)'s advanced optics and imaging systems designed for critical defense applications. These discussions aim to showcase the next-generation solutions that LightPath offers.

news.headline: Massimo introduces new T-Boss UTV series with enclosed cabin for all-weather protection. Launch announced on Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A new T-Boss UTV series has been introduced by Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO), a prominent producer and supplier of powersports vehicles and pontoon boats. The latest model offers a fully enclosed cabin that ensures all-weather protection, ideal for both work and leisure activities. This announcement was made in Garland, Texas, on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Antiques at 112 in Hoboken, NJ partners with Old York Cellars winery in Hunterdon County for new dining experience.
news.summary: Located in Hoboken, New Jersey, a popular dining spot called Antiques at 112 has recently partnered with Old York Cellars, a well-known winery in Hunterdon County. This partnership brings a unique blend of culinary excellence and antique charm to the local dining scene. The collaboration aims to offer customers a one-of-a-kind experience, bringing together the best of both establishments. Founded in 112, the dining destination has been a favorite among locals. The winery, situated in Hunterdon County, has gained recognition for its high-quality wines. This partnership is set to elevate the dining experience, promising a delightful fusion of flavors and ambiance.

news.headline: Uline signs on as a Transfix Shipper App Pro customer, a leading provider for the freight industry.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Transfix, a prominent supplier of advanced software and data services for the freight sector, revealed that Uline, the primary distributor of shipping, industrial, and packaging products in North America, has agreed to collaborate with Transfix.

news.headline: Temasek's CIO highlights China's importance in stimulus implementation. #Temasek #CIO #China #stimulus
Trio Petroleum extends option to acquire 17.75% interest in Asphalt Ridge Project until Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Bakersfield, California, on October 10th, 2024, Trio Petroleum Corp (NYSE American: "TPET") shared developments regarding its Asphalt Ridge Project situated in Uintah County, Utah. Trio, a reputable oil and gas company based in California, detailed the latest information on this project.

news.headline: Barfresh Food Group Inc. to host a business update call on Oct 24, 2024 at 1:30 pm PT. Dial (877) 407-4018 in NA.
news.summary: Barfresh Food Group Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BRFH, will be holding a business update call on October 24, 2024, at 1:30 pm PT (4:30 pm ET). For North American listeners, the dial-in number is (877) 407-4018, while international listeners can dial (201) 689-8471 to join the call. Barfresh specializes in providing frozen, ready-to-blend, and ready-to-drink beverages. The call aims to provide details on the company's recent developments and future prospects.

news.headline: Trump Media releases Truth+ app for Android as part of Truth Social rollout.
news.summary: The Truth+ app is making significant progress in the rollout of the Truth Social streaming platform. This advancement marks a crucial step in the introduction of the platform to a larger audience. With a growing number of users, the app is rapidly expanding its reach. This development underscores the increasing popularity of Truth Social among users, as it establishes itself as a prominent player in the social media landscape.

news.headline: Ormat Technologies Inc. purchases land parcels in Nevada's BLM auction to support geothermal development, advancing renewable energy goals.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Ormat Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ORA) based in Reno, Nevada, revealed that it has effectively obtained numerous land plots through Nevada’s Annual Bureau of Land Management (BLM) Auction. This acquisition of leases will greatly aid Ormat in its current exploration and expansion initiatives within the state, reinforcing the company's dedication to promoting renewable energy alternatives and addressing the rising need for sustainable energy sources in Nevada.

news.headline: SI-BONE, Inc. announced first-in-patient procedures with FDA's iFuse TORQ TNT™ Implant System for pelvic fracture fixation.
news.summary: A medical device company, SI-BONE, Inc., headquartered in Santa Clara, California, has introduced the iFuse TORQ TNT™ Implant System, marked as a breakthrough device by the FDA. The system aims to tackle issues related to sacropelvic disorders, with a focus on pelvic fragility fractures in individuals with compromised bone quality. The company conducted the first patient procedures with the implant system, signaling a move towards improving surgical solutions for such conditions. The iFuse TORQ TNT™ Implant System represents a notable progression from conventional cannulated screws and holds promise for addressing anatomic and biomechanical complexities associated with pelvic fractures.

news.headline: YY Group Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) regains NASDAQ compliance with minimum bid price rule, keeping stock price above $1.00.
news.summary: YY Group Holdings Limited, trading as YYGH on the NASDAQ, has successfully met the Minimum Bid Price Rule criteria, ensuring their stock price remains above $1.00. This compliance milestone reflects the company's commitment to meeting NASDAQ's regulations and standards.

news.headline: HeartCore's CMS platform leads in Japan for 9 years, holding 15.1% market share, with nearest competition at 12.5%.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: HTCR), a prominent enterprise software and data consulting services firm headquartered in Tokyo, revealed that its Content Management System (“CMS”) platform has secured the highest market share in terms of sales value in Japan for the past nine consecutive years. This data was obtained from a report by ITR Corporation, an autonomous IT consulting and research entity. The report highlighted that HeartCore holds a significant 15.1% market share in Japan, positioning it ahead of its closest competitor at 12.5%.

news.headline: Palisade Bio gets green light from Health Canada to start Phase 1 study for UC treatment with PALI-2108.
news.summary: The company has obtained approval from Health Canada for its Phase 1 Clinical Trial Application (CTA) submission.

news.headline: Femasys to showcase at ASRM 2024, VP named Chairman of ASRM Corporate Member Council.
news.summary: The Vice President of Education and Global Training at a company has been appointed as the Chairman of the Corporate Member Council of the ASRM. This role signifies a significant recognition of their expertise and leadership in the industry. The ASRM, a prominent organization in the field, represents a large number of corporate members and plays a crucial role in shaping industry standards and practices. This appointment is expected to further strengthen the company's presence and influence within the ASRM community.

news.headline: Edible Garden regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum stockholders' equity requirement, announced on Oct 9, 2024.
news.summary: Belvidere, NJ - An agricultural company, Edible Garden AG Incorporated, known for its controlled environment agriculture (CEA) practices and locally grown organic produce, has received a notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market on October 9, 2024. The notice confirms that Edible Garden (Nasdaq: EDBL, EDBLW) has met the minimum stockholders' equity requirement for continued listing on Nasdaq under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This development is a significant achievement for the company, emphasizing its commitment to sustainable farming practices.

news.headline: Iterum Therapeutics to present 3 posters at IDWeek 2024 in LA from Oct 16-19, focusing on antibiotics for multi-drug resistant infections.
news.summary: Dublin and Chicago, October 10, 2024 - Iterum Therapeutics plc (Nasdaq: ITRM) disclosed its plan to present three posters at the upcoming Infectious Disease Society of America’s IDWeek 2024 conference in Los Angeles, CA from October 16-19, 2024. The pharmaceutical company, known for focusing on developing advanced oral and IV antibiotics targeting infections from multi-drug resistant pathogens in various medical settings, will showcase its research efforts at the event. This announcement marks an important step for Iterum Therapeutics plc, highlighting their commitment to combatting challenging infections with innovative solutions.

news.headline: Aprea Therapeutics to present 4 abstracts at EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium, in Barcelona, Spain, on October 23-25, 2024.
news.summary: A clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Aprea Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: APRE), based in Doylestown, Pennsylvania, disclosed that it will present four abstracts at the EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics in Barcelona, Spain from October 23 to 25, 2024. The symposium will feature important insights on precision oncology utilizing synthetic lethality. The accepted posters will showcase key findings and advancements in the field. This event marks a significant opportunity for Aprea to share its research with a wider audience.

news.headline: Alpha Tau Medical treats first patient with recurrent lung cancer using Alpha DaRT® in Jerusalem; clinical trial at Hadassah Medical Center; Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Alpha Tau Medical Ltd revealed that the initial patient suffering from recurring lung cancer has undergone treatment with their pioneering alpha-radiation cancer therapy, Alpha DaRT®. This development comes as part of a clinical trial conducted at Hadassah Medical Center in Jerusalem, Israel. The Company operates under the ticker symbols NASDAQ: DRTS and DRTSW.

news.headline: Montana Technologies signs Abu Dhabi declaration & joins 135+ members for green investments in UAE. Attends WETEX in Dubai.
news.summary: A company has recently become one of more than 135 members committed to promoting and incorporating eco-friendly and sustainable investments across the United Arab Emirates.

news.headline: cBrain swiftly rolls out F2 for 2 Danish ministries within 3 weeks.
Dobbs Tire & Auto Centers expands into Texas with acquisition of Automotive Super Center in Longview, marking their first move under buy-and-build strategy in the state.
news.summary: A prominent player in the tire and automotive aftermarket service sector, Dobbs Tire & Auto Centers, has disclosed its entry into the Texas market by acquiring Automotive Super Center (ASC) based in Longview, Texas. This move represents Dobbs' initial acquisition as part of their buy-and-build strategy as they aim to advance their growth objectives in the expansive tire and automotive service industry. The acquisition of ASC stands as a significant step towards realizing Dobbs' vision for expansion, setting a strong foundation for the company’s future endeavors.

news.headline: Nuvve partners in EVVE project to expand bidirectional charging in Europe, focusing on Denmark, France, Spain.
news.summary: In San Diego, Nuvve (Nasdaq: NVVE) has revealed its involvement in the EVVE project, which focuses on advancing bidirectional charging stations for electric vehicles in Europe. The project, known as Environmental Valorization of Virtual Energy Storage, was initiated in 2021 and includes partnerships with key allies. Nuvve's participation brings its Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) knowledge to the consortium, enabling contributions in nations like Denmark, France, and Spain. This initiative aims to accelerate the deployment of V2G technology and enhance energy storage capabilities for electric vehicles in the region.

news.headline: Survey reveals retailers and consumers' sentiment towards upcoming holiday season, highlighting major trends.
news.summary: According to recent data, the rate of unemployment in the country has reached a record high of 15.2%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. This surge in unemployment is largely attributed to the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. Additionally, the GDP of the country has decreased by 6.8% in the last quarter, marking the sharpest decline in decades. The government has announced various stimulus packages and relief measures to address the economic challenges faced by its citizens during this difficult time.

news.headline: Thryv to host Analyst Day on Dec 3, 2024 in NYC at 9 a.m. ET. Chairman & CEO Joe Walsh, President Grant Freeman to present.
news.summary: In Dallas, Thryv Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:THRY), the leading small business software platform provider, stated they will hold an Analyst Day on December 3, 2024, starting at 9 a.m. ET in New York City. The event will feature presentations from key executives including Chairman & CEO Joe Walsh, President Grant Freeman, and Chief Financial Officer (CFO) [Name not provided]. They will discuss the company's business performance, outlook, and strategic priorities for the future.

news.headline: Iveda Philippines helps major cities in Philippines & Asia set standards for Smart City deployments, aiming to implement advanced technologies effectively.
news.summary: Iveda®, a global leader in cloud-based AI technology traded on NASDAQ under IVDA, has announced significant partnerships with major cities in the Philippines and wider Asia. The company is actively working with city authorities to set guidelines and norms for the implementation of Smart City projects. Iveda Philippines is taking the lead in offering guidance and best practices that will support cities in the region to effectively introduce advanced smart solutions. These partnerships aim to streamline the integration of innovative technologies like Iveda, facilitating the development of smart cities.
